nodes.name: 约翰·古尔德
nodes.summary: 约翰·古尔德是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联71种鸟类，包括绿棉凫、凍原豆雁、黄腹角雉等71种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Leichhardt River
nodes.summary: The Leichhardt River is a river in north-west Queensland, Australia.

nodes.name: Long-tailed finch
nodes.summary: Long-tailed finch（Long-tailed finch，学名 Poephila acuticauda），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联5个分布地点节点。

nodes.name: 卡奔塔利亞灣
nodes.summary: 卡奔塔利亞灣是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联5种鸟类，包括南鹰鸮、北澳玫瑰鹦鹉、Brown honeyeater等5种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Derby, Western Australia
nodes.summary: Derby ( DUR-bee) is a town in the Kimberley region of Western Australia.

nodes.name: 金伯利 (西澳)
nodes.summary: 金伯利 (西澳)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联15种鸟类，包括尖羽树鸭、北澳玫瑰鹦鹉、Black grasswren等15种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: |year=2024 |title=Poephila acuticauda |volume=2024 |article-number=e.T22719688A253992559 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2024-2.RLTS.T22719688A253992559.en |access-date=17 February 2025}} | taxon = Poephila acuticauda | authority = (Gould, 1840) | range_map = Long-tailed Finch.png | range_map_caption = Distribution }} The long-tailed finch (Poephila acuticauda) is a common species of estrildid finch found in northern Australia, from the Kimberley region to the Gulf of Carpentaria

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The long-tailed finch inhabits open woodland across northern Australia, from Derby in the northwest Kimberley region across to the east to the Leichhardt River in northwest Queensland. It has an estimated global extent of occurrence of 1,000,000–10,000,000 km2
